user.title: IKEA BILRESA Firmware Updater
user.description: Connect to your Home Assistant Matter Server. The URL is pre-filled from your existing Matter integration when available.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Matter Server at the given URL.

abort.already_configured: IKEA BILRESA Firmware Updater is already configured.

init.title: Keep-awake tuning
init.description: How often (in seconds) to re-send StayActiveRequest while a firmware update is running, when the device does not report a promised active duration. Lower values keep the remote awake more reliably but use slightly more battery.
